description: A decommissioning ticket has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/CHG-8042_decommission.txt. Review the ticket to determine which servers require data retention and which are fully retired. Create a group named exactly 'Decommissioned-Assets', add the retention servers to it, and mark them as Unmanaged to stop polling. Permanently delete the fully retired servers from the OpManager inventory. Do not modify or delete any active production servers. Credentials: admin/Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
